conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connections with E, I, and B because we explicitly committed to looking out for one another and shared a deep, mutual motivation for supporting our families. My conversations with E and I felt particularly sincere, establishing a sense of shared purpose and a promise to have each other's backs when things get difficult. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to J; while our exchange was polite and we share similar goals, we didn't establish a firm alliance or a specific plan for the game like I did with the others.

I made clear agreements to cooperate and protect each other's interests with E, I, B, and C to ensure we all walk away with something for our families. I feel I can genuinely trust I and E given our shared perspective on the high stakes, though I remain cautious of how the general atmosphere of desperation might make others unpredictable.
